name: Claude Code
description: Installs Claude Code CLI globally via npm. Declares a lace mount for persistent Claude configuration.

version.description: Claude Code version to install (npm version specifier).

config.description: Claude Code configuration, credentials, and session state

config-json.description: Host onboarding and account state overlay. Prevents re-onboarding in containers by providing the full host state file. Claude Code writes to this on every startup (counters, feature flags, preferences).
config-json.hint: Run 'claude' on the host first to create this file at ~/.claude.json
